imagery: Spilling the Tea afternoon tea cover + backstory note
text: The backstory for Spilling the Tea starts with an experience that is supposed to feel curated: different tea rooms, different menus, tiny bites arranged like choices. Then Lily noticed the same cucumber sandwiches, salmon, scones, and polite conversation repeating everywhere. That copy-paste feeling became the song. Listen here: https://youtu.be/9yqSVkZRass

imagery: Spilling the Tea cover art + observational frustration
text: The frustration in Spilling the Tea is not loud. It is observational: if afternoon tea is supposed to be about choice and connection, why does it feel so staged, so polite, and so interchangeable? Lily turns that copy-paste feeling into the core of the song. Watch here: https://youtu.be/9yqSVkZRass
